overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player character moves from an elevated outdoor lounge, descends to street level, crosses a busy intersection with heavy digital signage, and ascends to a covered pedestrian overpass with distinctive orange architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated outdoor lounge with curved glass walls and purple neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through a futuristic outdoor seating area with curved glass architecture and purple neon table lighting

notable_agents.action: seated at a curved booth table facing away from the camera

entered.detail: futuristic semi-circular lounge structure with glass walls and metal framing
circular table with glowing purple neon lighting underneath
curved banquette seating with dark upholstery
transparent glass safety railing overlooking the city street below
distant view of neon-lit buildings and city lights through the glass walls

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside an elevated outdoor lounge with curved glass walls and distinctive purple neon lighting on the tables. The camera moves forward through the seating area, passing by patrons seated in curved booths, with views of the neon-lit city visible through the glass railings.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairway descending from elevated lounge to street level

events.description: exits the curved glass lounge and enters a concrete stairwell descending to street level
emerges from the shaded stairwell onto the street illuminated by neon signs and streetlights

agents.ego_description: walking down concrete stairs with metal railings from the elevated lounge to reach the city street below

entered.detail: descending concrete stairs with worn texture leading down from the lounge
silver metal handrail along the left side of the stairway
city sidewalk at street level with concrete pavement
dark asphalt street with yellow lane markings
tall futuristic buildings with illuminated windows and signage

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the lounge and descends a concrete stairwell with metal railings, transitioning from the sheltered neon-lit interior to the open city street. Upon reaching street level, the scene opens to reveal asphalt roads, sidewalks, and the base of towering urban buildings with illuminated facades.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with heavy digital signage and futuristic architecture

events.description: crossing the wide street at a major intersection with moving vehicle traffic
turning right to follow the sidewalk along the main arterial road

agents.ego_description: walking across the wide city intersection and along the sidewalk through a neon-lit downtown area with heavy signage

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver car driving through the intersection
pedestrian walking along the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: large open intersection with multiple lanes and crosswalk markings
distinctive cylindrical building with horizontal neon light strips in multiple colors
large illuminated advertising screens displaying animated content on building facades
tall streetlight with orange glow illuminating the sidewalk
ground-level commercial spaces with lit signage and displays

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection dominated by a distinctive spiral tower wrapped in colorful neon lights. The camera crosses the asphalt road with other pedestrians while futuristic vehicles pass by, then turns to follow a sidewalk lined with digital billboards and storefronts beneath towering skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairway ascending to elevated pedestrian overpass

events.description: approaching and beginning to ascend stairs leading to an elevated pedestrian walkway
reaching the top of the stairs and transitioning to the level overpass walkway

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs with teal-colored railings to reach the pedestrian overpass above the street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian descending the stairs in the opposite direction

entered.detail: opening in the sidewalk railing leading to stairs going upward
flight of concrete stairs ascending to the overpass level
distinctive teal-colored metal handrails along the stairway
entrance to the covered pedestrian bridge visible at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a stairway entrance on the right and begins ascending concrete steps with distinctive teal railings. As the camera climbs, the spiral neon tower remains visible to the left while the street level falls away below, leading up to the entrance of an elevated pedestrian walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian overpass with orange arch supports and glass walls

events.description: entering the covered pedestrian bridge with curved orange structural arches
passing other pedestrians in the narrow covered walkway

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered pedestrian tunnel with orange arches and glass walls overlooking the neon city below

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking toward camera through the covered bridge

entered.detail: enclosed walkway with roof structure spanning over the street below
curved orange structural ribs supporting the tunnel roof
transparent glass panels on the sides of the walkway showing the city view

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered pedestrian overpass featuring distinctive curved orange structural arches and glass walls. The walkway provides an elevated view of the neon-lit city streets below while other pedestrians pass by in the enclosed tunnel-like space. The spiral tower remains visible in the distance through the glass panels as the camera progresses along the overpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an intimate, neon-lit lounge down into a bustling futuristic city center and back up to an elevated walkway. It begins by gliding through an outdoor lounge with curved glass walls and purple neon accents before exiting the sheltered space to descend a concrete stairwell. As the camera reaches street level, the environment opens into a wide urban intersection dominated by a glowing spiral tower and towering skyscrapers lined with digital billboards. The scene then shifts as the camera turns toward a stairway with teal railings, ascending away from the asphalt roads and passing vehicles. Finally, the movement leads into a covered pedestrian overpass characterized by curved orange structural arches, providing a high-angle view of the neon city and the distant spiral tower through glass panels.
